Name: MIMIC-IV Full v3.1
Notes: Already have demo. CITI training needed. Same schema as Phase 1.

Name: eICU Collaborative Research Database
Notes: Same PhysioNet credentials. Multi-center validation.

Name: AmsterdamUMCdb
Notes: European ICU data. Good for generalization testing.

Name: Stanford INSPECT
Notes: Released Feb 2025. Multi-modal EHR + imaging.

Name: OASIS-4
Notes: Neurodegenerative trajectories. Good for brain aging.

Name: Medicaid Open Data
Notes: Largest Medicaid dataset ever released (Feb 2026). Population-scale.

Name: All of Us (NIH CDR v8)
Notes: 11M person-days of Fitbit data (Jan 2026). Most diverse US cohort.

Name: UK Biobank
Notes: THE gold standard. 500K metabolomics released 2025. 490K WGS.

Name: FinnGen R13/R14
Notes: Oct 2025 lab value GWAS. Excellent for disease trajectory prediction.

Name: Human Phenotype Project
Modalities: Genetics + microbiome + CGM + sleep + bone density
Notes: Eran Segal / Weizmann. Published Nature Medicine Jul 2025. Blueprint for digital twins.

Name: Bridge2AI (CHoRUS)
Notes: Landmark waveform release Jul 2025. NIH-funded.

Name: Nightingale Open Science
Notes: New waveform datasets. Multi-modal imaging.

Name: ADNI (Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging)
Modalities: Longitudinal brain MRI + PET + genomics + biomarkers
Notes: 20+ years of longitudinal neuroimaging. Gold standard for neuro.

Name: MESA (Multi-Ethnic Study of Atherosclerosis)
Notes: 20-year follow-up. Perfect for CVD trajectory modeling.

Name: OAI (Osteoarthritis Initiative)
Notes: 10-year follow-up. Musculoskeletal trajectories.

Name: mPower Parkinson Study
Notes: Mobile health longitudinal data. Parkinson's progression.

Name: MyHeart Counts
Notes: 2026 Android expansion. Cardiovascular wearable data.

Name: NHANES
Modalities: Labs + demographics + dietary recall + mortality linkage
Notes: Nationally representative. Good for population-level calibration.

Name: PhysioNet Challenge Datasets
Notes: Well-benchmarked competition datasets.

Name: GTEx
Notes: Links genomic variation to tissue-level effects.

Name: TOPMed
Notes: NHLBI whole genome sequencing program.

Name: Vivli
Notes: Updated v3.9 platform Mar 2026.

Name: YODA Project
Notes: J&J longitudinal individual patient data.

Name: Project Data Sphere
Notes: Cancer-focused trial data sharing.

Name: GluCon / OhioT1DM
Notes: Metabolic modeling. Like GluFormer training data.

Name: ClinicalTrials.gov
Notes: Good for knowledge graph augmentation.

Name: Delphi-2M
Notes: Competitor. Predicts diseases 20 years out.

Name: MedGemma
Notes: Google's open multimodal medical model. Jul 2025.

Name: Merlin
Notes: 5-year chronic disease prediction from single CT. Released everything.
